title: My ongoing mental breakdown hasnt ended
description: A port of the second mental breakdown I had on planet minecraft
body:
This is a port of my second mental breakdown resource pack that I posted to planet minecraft, enjoy!

heres a few of the things it changes so i dont upset the mods (they're cute)
 
||short swords \ netherite sword with diamonds
 
||totem is an anime girl to look at cute as the modrinth moderators (they still cuter)
 
||the music discs are anime girls too
